name: Cran-Apple Tamale Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the apples.
2. In a large saucepan, combine all filling ingredients except water and arrowroot. Bring to boil, cover, reduce heat to low and simmer until tender, about 30 minutes.
3. If the filling is too thin, remove the cover and evaporate excess liquid by simmering over low heat.
4. Dissolve arrowroot in water and add to cranberry mixture. Stir until thick like stewed fruit.
Fill and cook tamales, according to "Tamales: Basic Procedure".
